A description of the main activities of the project 
Programme structure highlighted here corresponds with the newly extended CPAP (2011-2012)
2.1    Technical Support, Guidance and Coordination CFLG Expansion in DACAW districts
2.2    Knowledge management
2.3    Innovation (aligning DACAW in selected districts, training orientation support to SMs/CFs on the use of CIB, PRA, Triple A
2.4 Technical assistance

implementing_agency: Kapilvastu District Development Committee, Chitwan District Development Committee, Jumla District Development Committee, Kalikot District Development Committee, Dolpa District Development Committee, Humla District Development Committee, Bajhang District Development Committee, Kavrepalanchowk District Development Committee, Udayapur District Development Committee, Accham District Development Committee, Panchthar District Development Committee, Dang District Development Committee, Kaski District Development Committee, Bajura District Development Committee, Dadeldhura District Development Committee, Nawalparasi District Development Committee, Rukum District Development Committee, Saptari District Development Committee, Jajarkot District Development Committee, Sunsari District Development Committee, Tanahun District Development Committee, Mugu District Development Committee, Parsa District Development Committee, Ministry of Federal Affairs & General Administration

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
